title: Python Basics & Syntax
description: Learn variables, data types, operators, and basic syntax. Complete 2-3 exercises from Codecademy or a similar platform.

title: Control Flow
description: Master if statements, loops (for/while), and break/continue. Build a simple program using control flow.

title: Functions & Modules
description: Create custom functions, understand parameters, and explore built-in modules (e.g., math, random). Write 3 function-based projects.

title: Data Structures
description: Learn lists, tuples, dictionaries, and sets. Practice common operations (append, index, iterate).

title: Error Handling & File I/O
description: Study try/except, file handling (open/read/write). Build a program that reads a file and handles errors.

title: Object-Oriented Programming
description: Introduce classes, objects, and inheritance. Create a simple class-based project.

title: Projects & Problem-Solving
description: Build a small project (e.g., to-do list, calculator) to consolidate all concepts. Solve 2-3 LeetCode/Codewars problems.

title: Advanced Topics (Optional)
description: Explore lambda functions, list comprehensions, or basic APIs. Update project with advanced features.

title: Projects & Problem-Solving
description: Build a more complex project (e.g., weather app, quiz game). Solve 3-5 LeetCode problems.

title: Projects & Problem-Solving
description: Build a capstone project (e.g., data analysis, automation script). Solve 5-8 LeetCode problems.

title: Review & Reinforcement
description: Review all concepts. Debug common errors. Practice coding for 2 hours.

title: Final Project & Code Review
description: Complete a final project integrating all concepts. Have a peer review your code for feedback.

title: Reflection & Next Steps
description: Assess progress. Identify areas for further learning. Set goals for future Python projects.
